comment: entevate.com/gtm is the canonical URL for the Growth Engine Next.js app.
The app itself lives in a separate Vercel project (entevate-growth-engine).
This vercel.json rewrites /gtm/* traffic from entevate.com to that deployment,
and redirects /growth-engine and its descendants to /gtm as a convenience alias.
REPLACE 'entevate-growth-engine.vercel.app' with the real deployment URL
once the growth-engine Vercel project is created.
